pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates project at this location (line 9: WORKSPACE_DIR=/home/ga/eclipse-workspace, PROJECT_NAME=DoseCalcService)
setup_task.sh writes pom.xml to this exact path (line 18: cat > "$PROJECT_DIR/pom.xml")

Task description states commons-logging must be excluded. httpclient 4.5.13 includes commons-logging:commons-logging:1.2 as a compile-scope transitive dependency (verified via Maven Central and Apache Maven pom.xml for httpclient 4.5.13)

setup_task.sh includes org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient:4.5.13 as a direct dependency which transitively brings in commons-logging. Verified via Maven Central httpclient 4.5.13 pom.xml showing commons-logging as a direct dependency
setup_task.sh line 42 specifies version 4.5.13. Verified to exist on Maven Central Repository

httpclient 4.5.13 pom.xml on Maven Central (https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/httpcomponents/httpclient/4.5.13/httpclient-4.5.13.pom) shows commons-logging 1.2 as a direct compile-scope dependency
setup_task.sh line 48 specifies version 1.7.32. Verified to exist on Maven Central Repository (org.slf4j:jcl-over-slf4j:1.7.32)
setup_task.sh line 54 specifies version 1.7.32. Verified to exist on Maven Central Repository (org.slf4j:slf4j-api:1.7.32)
setup_task.sh line 60 specifies version 4.11. Verified to exist on Maven Central Repository (junit:junit:4.11)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves resolving a Maven dependency conflict in the DoseCalcService project. The synthetic pom.xml includes org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient:4.5.13, which transitively depends on commons-logging:commons-logging:1.2 (verified from Maven Central). The task requires excluding commons-logging from httpclient using an exclusion tag in pom.xml. All metadata paths are correct: project_path is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DoseCalcService and pom_path is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DoseCalcService/pom.xml. The excluded artifact is commons-logging, the parent artifact is httpclient. Additional verified dependencies include jcl-over-slf4j:1.7.32 and slf4j-api:1.7.32 (intended as SLF4J replacement), plus junit:4.11 for testing.
